aleabit.layer_label: Data center liquid cooling (immersion / cold plate)
aleabit.verdict_label: Liquid cooling for AI server racks, Sugon affiliate, small float
aleabit.thesis: Immersion and cold-plate liquid cooling vendor under Sugon umbrella. AI rack power densities forcing liquid cooling adoption is exactly the kind of convergence Serenity hunts. Caveat: parent's US entity-list status risks margin (sells mainly into Sugon AI servers which face their own constraint). Small float, BSE listing, low analyst coverage.
